data.title: Litecoin Up More Than 6% In 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Litecoin's (CRYPTO: LTC) price has risen 6.24% to $134.48. This continues its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 18.0% gain, moving from $115.3 to its current price. As it stands right now, the coin's all-time high is $410.26.

data.title: Trimble Beats Expectations In Q4, Software And Recurring Revenue Drive Growth
data.description: Trimble Inc (TRMB) reported 4Q24 revenue growth of 5% Y/Y to $983.4 million, beating analyst estimate. Organic growth was 17% Y/Y. EPS of 89 cents beat consensus. Outlook for FY25 is $3.37B-$3.47B in revenue and $2.76-$2.98 in adjusted EPS. Buyback program approved for up to $1B. Stock up 1.68% premarket.

data.title: Smart Money Is Betting Big In BABA Options
Solana Down 32% In A Month As Sentiment Hits Lows: What Is Going On?
data.description: Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) is down 32% in a month, falling to a three-month low of $161, with trader sentiment at its lowest driven by recent market trends and the LIBRA rug pull<

data.title: Ameresco Expands Smart City Tech In New Orleans With LED Streetlight Pilot
data.description: Partnering with Legacy Professional Services and AllStar Electric, Ameresco will upgrade 56 streetlights with LED equivalents.
